hooks.command: bash -c 'L=/home/generatedByTermius/agentGuidance/agent.md; if [ -f "$L" ]; then SHA=$(git -C /home/generatedByTermius/agentGuidance rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); echo "<!-- agent.md v1.0.0 | commit: $SHA | source: local -->"; cat "$L"; elif R=$(curl -s --max-time 10 https://raw.githubusercontent.com/npezarro/agentGuidance/main/agent.md 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$R" ]; then echo "<!-- agent.md | source: network-fallback -->"; echo "$R"; else echo "<!-- WARNING: agent.md unavailable -->"; echo "# Minimal Safety Policy"; echo "- Never commit secrets or .env contents"; echo "- Never force-push without confirmation"; echo "- Update context.md with every code change"; fi'
